metadata.description: Two-way local OAuth-only bridge between Claude Code and Grok Build. Claude hands visual work (Grok Imagine) and multi-agent reviews to Grok; Grok can hand complementary tasks back.

plugins.name: grok
plugins.description: Bridge to Grok Build: /grok-imagine for all image+video generation/editing, /grok-review for multi-agent delegation. Local OAuth only, no API keys.
